title: Copper Rod Wrench
description: Adds a tool to help place copper rods!
body:
This datapack adds a helpful tool used to rotate and extent lightning rods known as a Copper Rod Wrench!

### How To Use The Copper Rod Wrench
Left click on a lightning rod to extend the rod by another block. (only works if you have lighning rods in your inventory)
Shift left click a lightning rod to rotate it.

### Why Would I Even Need This?

If you like building with lightning rods then it is a great tool to use to speed up the process!
If you don't build with lightning rods then there are some other fun datapacks that utilize copper rods as a wire for transmitting power that this datapack works well with!

Here is a datapack that works well with this datapack

Copper Contraptions By Me https://modrinth.com/datapack/copper-contraptions

Copper Wiring By Aura Acorn: https://modrinth.com/datapack/copper-wiring
